@startuml
participant "Solution41" as Solution41
participant "NameSorter" as NameSorter

Solution41 ..> NameSorter : "main(String[])"

NameSorter ..> Solution41 : "readNames(String fileName)"

NameSorter ..> Solution41 : "sortNames()"

NameSorter ..> Solution41 : "writeNames(String fileName)"

@enduml
